title: From Reference to Editable Session: Agentic Music Production Without Giving Up Control
excerpt: Learn how indie producers maintain creative control during AI-assisted composition. Master agentic workflows in Ableton Live while preserving your original vision.

title: ReelSynth: An Open Wavetable Synthesizer Instrument for Inspectable Sound Design
excerpt: ReelSynth is a wavetable synthesizer instrument — not a black-box preset machine. Import cycles, route modulation, and keep every parameter editable under pressure.
